parameters.jsonBody: {"query":"{ menus(first: 50) { edges { node { id handle title items { id title type url } } } } }"}

storeOs.cloudCompatibility: FULL — no filesystem access, no AJV. All Shopify API calls use shopifyOAuth2Api credential injected by n8n.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1. Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config, store_blueprint, content_strategy }
storeOs.output: { status: 'PHASE_7B2_COMPLETE' | 'PHASE_7B2_PARTIAL' | 'PHASE_7B2_FAILED', project_id, shop_url, pages_created, pages_updated, navigation_created, navigation_updated, errors, warnings, blueprint_summary, safety_notes }
safetyGuarantees: No Shopify resources are ever deleted — only create (POST) and update (PUT) operations
Upsert by handle: existing handles are updated, new handles are created
All new pages are created with published: false — not visible until manually published
continueOnFail: true on HTTP nodes — errors are collected, not fatal
neverError: true on HTTP nodes — HTTP 4xx/5xx return as items, not exceptions

shopifyOAuth2Api.name: Shopify SuppliedTech Admin
shopifyOAuth2Api.note: Replace id with your n8n shopifyOAuth2Api credential ID if deploying to a different instance
